location.address: King Fahad Highway 30, Exit 245, Julai'a, Kuwait

awards: Winner 2014 for World Luxury Hotel Award

chalets.name: Two Bedroom Chalet (First Floor)
chalets.description: Ideal chalet in the heart of SeaShell with a view to relax and unwind. Features a cozy balcony.

specifications.location: First floor of the chalet complex, facing SeaShell's center and close to main swimming pool
specifications.balcony: Cozy balcony with 2 chairs and 1 table, partial pool view

amenities: Complimentary coffee/tea tray and 2 water bottles (upon request)
bedding_features: Baby cots available (1 complimentary, additional fee applies)
hospitality_services: Free access to pools and beach

chalets.name: Two Bedroom Chalet (Ground Floor)
chalets.description: Same as first floor chalet but features an outdoor terrace designed for barbeque gatherings.

specifications.location: Ground floor of the chalet complex, facing SeaShell's center and close to main swimming pool
specifications.terrace: Outdoor terrace with dining table, 4 chairs and umbrella; private terrace with 2 chairs, 1 table, partial pool view

amenities: Complimentary coffee/tea tray and 2 water bottles (upon request)
bedding_features: Baby cots available (1 complimentary, additional fee applies)
hospitality_services: Free access to pools and beach

chalets.name: Three Bedroom Chalet (No View)
chalets.description: Features three bedrooms, three bathrooms, storage room, fully equipped kitchen, living room and private terrace.

chalets.name: Three Bedroom Chalet (Garden View)
chalets.description: Two-level villa overlooking the main hotel garden. Features three bedrooms, three bathrooms, storage room. Overlooks garden and swimming pool.

chalets.name: Four Bedroom Chalet (Panoramic View)
chalets.description: Located in the center of the resort, overlooking the main swimming pool and garden. Master bedroom on upper level with seaside view.

specifications.view: Main swimming pool, garden, seaside (master bedroom)

chalets.name: Beach Front Four Bedroom Chalet
chalets.description: Faces the sea with wonderful view. Four bedrooms, four bathrooms, storage room with equipped kitchen and living room for family gatherings.

chalets.name: Beach Patio Four Bedroom Chalet
chalets.description: Beach view chalet with unique patio. Terrace designed for dinner parties and family gatherings.

chalets.name: Private Pool Four Bedroom Chalet
chalets.description: Exclusive private pool chalet for family gatherings. Beach view with outdoor dining.

rooms.name: Standard Room (King Bed)
rooms.description: Simple room above the reception with view of main courtyard, café Presto, and fountain.

specifications.location: Second floor, right above the reception

amenities: Complimentary coffee/tea tray and 2 water bottles (replenished daily)
bedding_features: King or twin beds (depending on preference)
Baby cots available (1 complimentary, additional fee applies)
hospitality_services: Free access to pools and beach

rooms.name: Studio (First Floor)
rooms.description: Spacious studio for small families with view of resort's garden and Avenue's swimming pool.

specifications.view: Resort garden and Avenue's swimming pool

rooms.description: Spacious studio for small families with view of resort's garden and Avenue's swimming pool.

specifications.view: Resort garden and Avenue's swimming pool

rooms.description: Spacious suite for small families with view of resort's garden and Avenue's swimming pool.

amenities: Complimentary coffee/tea tray and 2 water bottles (replenished daily)
bedding_features: Baby cots available (1 complimentary, additional fee applies)

rooms.name: Junior Suite (Ground Floor)
rooms.description: Spacious suite for small families with view of resort's garden and Avenue's swimming pool.

specifications.view: Resort garden and Avenue's swimming pool

rooms.name: Superior Room
rooms.description: Designed for comfort and relaxation with exclusive jacuzzi.

rooms.name: Presidential Suite
rooms.description: Spacious living room with king-sized bed, jacuzzi and shower overlooking main courtyard. Interconnected rooms available.

specifications.terrace: 80 sqm terrace with wide view of the playground

amenities: 2 TVs (107cm/42in in living room, 81cm/32in in bedroom)
Complimentary coffee/tea tray and 2 water bottles (replenished daily)
bedding_features: Baby cots available (1 complimentary, additional fee applies)
hospitality_services: Free access to pools and beach

restaurants_and_cafes.name: Avenue
restaurants_and_cafes.description: Located in the basement of the reception, overlooking the swimming pool with indoor and outdoor terrace for panoramic views. Serves a la carte dishes with both oriental and occidental cuisines. Suitable for groups, events and celebrations.
restaurants_and_cafes.location_tag: Basement of reception, overlooking swimming pool

restaurants_and_cafes.name: Café Presto
restaurants_and_cafes.description: Located at the resort entrance porch, welcoming guests with fresh coffee and croissants. Warm and inviting atmosphere for friends and families. Modern design with rich menu including Italian Pizza prepared fresh in front of guests. Popular hangout for young adults and professionals.
restaurants_and_cafes.location_tag: Porch at resort entrance, near the fountain

restaurants_and_cafes.name: Gazebo
restaurants_and_cafes.description: Pool bar near the main swimming pool serving food and cool drinks.

restaurants_and_cafes.name: SeaShell Restaurant
restaurants_and_cafes.description: Main resort restaurant. (Detailed description not available on website)
features: Breakfast buffet (Western and Arabian combined - per TripAdvisor)

additional_dining_services: Family picnics and lunches on the beachside (arranged upon request)

pools_and_beach.name: Avenue Swimming Pool
features: Viewed from Studios and Junior Suites

pools_and_beach.name: Private Outdoor Ladies' Pool
pools_and_beach.description: Dedicated private outdoor swimming pool for ladies

pools_and_beach.name: Private Pool (in Private Pool Four Bedroom Chalet)
pools_and_beach.description: Exclusive pool in the Private Pool Four Bedroom Chalet

pools_and_beach.name: Beach Access
pools_and_beach.description: White sandy beach of Julai'a with seafront access

sports_and_recreation.name: Water Sports
sports_and_recreation.description: Jet-ski and other water activities on the Gulf

business_facilities.name: Conference Room
business_facilities.description: Two multi-function meeting/conference rooms available for workshops, management seminars, and training sessions. Customizable setup with assistance in organizing events.

local_area_attractions.description: SeaShell Hotel & Resort is located on the Gulf's coastline in Julai'a, about an hour's drive from downtown Kuwait City. The resort embodies a Mediterranean atmosphere with seafront swimming pools and floral landscapes.

nearby_attractions.name: Bnaider Beach Area
nearby_attractions.description: Popular beach destination area in southern Kuwait

check_in_out.note: Specific check-in and check-out times are not listed on the website. Contact the resort directly for this information.

pet_policy.note: Not specified on website. Contact resort for details.

children_policy.baby_cots: 1 baby cot complimentary per room; additional cots subject to fee
children_policy.kids_facilities: Children's playground, Kids' Club, Kids' Cinema available

payment.day_pass_fee: 10 KD for facility day use (5 KD usable at restaurant, per TripAdvisor review)
payment.note: Payment methods not specified. Contact resort for details.

policies_and_information.parking: Complimentary parking available (1 car per chalet)
policies_and_information.wi_fi: Complimentary Wi-Fi access throughout the resort
policies_and_information.laundry: Laundry and dry cleaning services available (subject to fee)
policies_and_information.former_name: Formerly Kempinski Julai'a Hotel and Resort (per TripAdvisor)

rating.tripadvisor: Mixed reviews - praised for breakfast buffet and grounds
